factors.summary: Demand trends are mixed with some segments showing growth and others decline.

evidence.text: Intelligent Devices sales increased 8.3 percent year over year, while Lifecycle Services sales decreased 5.5 percent year over year.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed demand trends with some growth and some decline across segments.

factors.summary: Organic growth is mixed across segments.

evidence.text: Intelligent Devices organic sales increased 5.8 percent in the three months, while Lifecycle Services organic sales decreased 11.0 percent year over year.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed organic growth with increases in some segments and declines in others.

factors.summary: Margins are mixed with some segments improving and others declining.

evidence.text: Intelligent Devices segment operating margin increased to 23.8 percent, while Software & Control segment operating margin decreased to 29.8 percent.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed margin performance with improvements in some segments and declines in others.

evidence.text: Free cash flow was $543.3 million for the six months ended March 31, 2021, compared to $391.9 million for the same period in 2020.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Free cash flow has improved significantly compared to the previous year.
